claims.summary: Mode packing, gravity, porosity, pressure, density, and viscosity must remain separate evidence dimensions.
claims.disposition: verify producer telemetry and regulator review types keep these components distinct

claims.summary: Current boundary cartography exposes pressure plateaus, low-porosity regions, and advisory damping saturation without proving a threshold change.
claims.disposition: run and record a read-only cartography and 45-minute live-database replay

claims.summary: Adding a porosity floor or changing pressure, PI, fill, rescue, damping, or regulator thresholds would alter live control.
claims.disposition: gate behind exact Mike/operator Tier 5 approval
claims.authority: No porosity floor, pressure, PI, fill, rescue, damping, or regulator threshold change is authorized.
